title: AI document collaboration tool review: Google Docs vs Microsoft 365 vs Dropbox Paper remote writing comparison - 2026 Review
description: Evaluate the intelligent editing and team writing functions of Google Docs, Microsoft 365, Dropbox Paper and other AI document collaboration tools to help you find the most suitable document collaboration solution for remote teams.
content:
Document Collaboration Challenges for Remote Teams

Remote teams need to collaboratively write documents: real-time editing, comment feedback, version management. AI document tools intelligent editing, automatic formatting, collaborative management.crosoft365 Dropbox Paper Notion AI Writing limited✅ limited✅ real-time collaboration Strongest Strong Strong Strong Version Management✅✅✅✅ Integration Strong Strongest Medium Strong Price free $6 free $8

Learn more about Google Docs

Google Docsreal-time is the most collaborative, free to use, AI Writing limited.

  • Core capabilities: real-time collaboration, reviews, version history, Google ecology
  • Advantages: best real-time collaboration, free to use, google integration
  • disAdvantages: AI writing limited, the format is not as good as Word
  • Price: Personal free, Enterprise $6/month

Microsoft 365 Explained

Microsoft 365 AI Writing Copilot, Word Professional, Enterprise Integration.

  • Core capabilities: AI Writing Copilot, Word Pro, Teamwork, Office Ecosystem
  • Advantages:Strongest AI Writing, Word Pro, Office Integration
  • disAdvantages: higher prices, less real-time collaboration than Google
  • Price: Business Basic $6/month

Dropbox Paper Explained

Dropbox Paper is lightweight collaboration, free to use, and smooth to experience.

  • Core capabilities: Lightweight Collaboration, Comments, Task Management, Dropbox Integration
  • Advantages: free usage, lightweight flow, task management
  • disAdvantages: AI Writing limited, Format Basic
  • Price:Completely free

Notion Explained in Detail

Notion AI Writing + Knowledge Base, Flexible Pages, Collaborative Management.

  • Core capabilities: AI writing, knowledge base, flexible pages, collaboration
  • Advantages: good AI writing, high flexibility, integrated knowledge base
  • disAdvantages: real-time collaboration is not as strong as Google, Word format
  • Price: free version available,ble > Tools AI Writing real-time collaboration Price Best scenarios Google Docs limited Strongest free real-time collaboration Microsoft 365✅ Strong $6 AI Writing Dropbox Paper limited Strong free Lightweight collaboration Notion✅ Strong $8 Knowledge Management

    Select Suggestions

    Google Docs for real-time collaborationSelect Microsoft 365 for AI writing, Dropbox Paper for lightweight collaboration, and Notion for knowledge management. It is recommended that Google Docs collaboration + Microsoft 365 AI writing, the combination is optimal.
author: Document Collaboration Analyst
